title: aspris caryophyllea
intro: Aspris caryophyllea, also known as Rockrose or Cistus, is a perennial shrub belonging to the Cistaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects, making it useful in wound healing and soothing skin irritations. The health benefits of Aspris caryophyllea include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting tissue repair, which can be beneficial for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Aspris caryophyllea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
